_comment: Extraction completeness invariants for the atelier plugin. After Epic 2 moved Fat-Controller command logic into skill references, these tokens MUST remain present somewhere under plugins/atelier/ (skills + surviving commands). If a refactor drops one, validate fails — catching the class of regression where thinning a command loses load-bearing content (e.g. design output structures, the #643 merge guard, the rebase --continue conflict guard). Each invariant: a token (literal substring) that must appear in >=1 file under the listed search root, with a human reason.
